---
title: "Learning Reflection"
subtitle: "Critical Self-Assessment & Future Goals"
author: "SONGTING CHEN"
date: "2026-04-25"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
## 1. Key Reflections
As an Accounting and Finance student, this module has been a significant bridge between traditional reporting and modern data science. The most valuable takeaway was moving beyond spreadsheets to a professional VS Code workflow. Integrating Python directly into reports ensures data integrity and transparency, which are essential for modern auditing and reproducible financial analysis.
:::

::: {.callout-important appearance="minimal"}
## 2. Challenges & Troubleshooting
The transition to web development presented real technical hurdles. I initially struggled with Git configuration and encountered errors during deployment. Successfully troubleshooting these—specifically learning to manage asset paths and manually point the GitHub Pages source to the /docs folder—greatly enhanced my technical resilience and attention to detail.
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
## 3. Future Strategic Vision
These skills provide a solid foundation for my journey as a tech-enabled financial professional. I plan to leverage automated reporting to enhance audit efficiency and use data analytics for strategic consulting. This ePortfolio serves as the first step in my goal to bridge the gap between financial expertise and technological innovation.

---
